source_pr.title: store/tikv:use tikv.error.ErrNotExist instead of kv.ErrNotExist
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: AndreMouche

### What problem does this PR solve?
It is blocked by #24273 
This PR uses `tikv/error/ErrNotExist` instead of `kv.ErrNotExist` so we needn't import tidb/kv package in these situtations in tikv package.
Part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22513

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->
Tests 
- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

symptoms: + c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test") | tk.MustQuery("select * from t where a>=1 and a<15 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "2 2", "11 11", "12 12")) (executor/distsql_test.go)
